title: How employment changes when firms adopt generative AI
abstract: Have you ever wondered how the job market transforms when companies get their hands on generative AI? This tool is like a magic book, unveiling the rise and fall of jobs—and your career's wild ride—when businesses embrace this new technology. Dive in to find out!
abstract_zh: 你有没有想过，当公司开始玩弄“生成式AI”这把双刃剑，就业市场会变成啥样？这个工具就像一本魔法书，揭示了企业采用这项新技术后，岗位的生死轮回和你的职业生涯可能经历的奇遇。快来一探究竟吧！
